title: A Day in The children's house
disclaimer: The actual schedule may vary for different branches and is subject to change when there are special activities such as excursions, events, etc.

blocks.title: Arrival & Settling In
blocks.description: Gentle drop-off routines, diaper checks, and free exploration in the infant–toddler prepared environment.

blocks.title: Sensory & Practical Life
blocks.description: Hands-on Montessori activities that build fine motor skills, language, and independence at each child's pace.

blocks.title: Snack & Care Routines
blocks.description: Healthy snack with feeding support, hand washing, and toileting routines guided by caregivers.

blocks.title: Outdoor & Gross Motor
blocks.description: Fresh air, climbing, sand play, and movement activities that support physical development.

blocks.title: Circle Time & Stories
blocks.description: Songs, rhymes, and picture books to nurture language, listening, and social connection.

blocks.title: Lunch
blocks.description: Nutritious meal with support for self-feeding, table manners, and calm transitions.

blocks.title: Nap / Quiet Rest
blocks.description: Individual sleep schedules in a peaceful setting; quiet activities for early risers.

blocks.title: Afternoon Activities
blocks.description: Art, music, and guided play to extend learning before pick-up.

blocks.title: Tea & Dismissal
blocks.description: Light snack and handover to parents. Half-day pick-up from 1:00 PM at selected centres.

blocks.title: Arrival & Free Play
blocks.description: Children arrive and settle in with free choice activities in the prepared environment.

blocks.title: Morning Circle
blocks.description: Group gathering for songs, calendar, weather, and community building.

blocks.title: Montessori Work Cycle
blocks.description: Uninterrupted work period with didactic materials across all five Montessori areas.

blocks.title: Snack Time
blocks.description: Healthy snack with practical life skills — setting table, serving, and cleaning up.

blocks.title: Outdoor Play
blocks.description: Physical activity, nature exploration, and social play in outdoor spaces.

blocks.title: Lunch
blocks.description: Nutritious meal with grace and courtesy, fostering independence and table manners.

blocks.title: Rest / Nap Time
blocks.description: Quiet rest period for younger children; quiet activities for non-nappers.

blocks.title: Afternoon Activities
blocks.description: STEAM projects, art, music, and group activities to extend learning.

blocks.title: Tea Time
blocks.description: Afternoon snack and preparation for departure.

blocks.title: Dismissal
blocks.description: End of half-day programme. Full-day children continue with enrichment until 6:00 PM.
